description: V189 — Creator stages (1–5). Evaluated top-down; first matching rule wins.

stages.title: Optimize for revenue
stages.summary: Double down on offers, proof, and conversion-oriented hooks.

stages.title: Optimize for growth
stages.summary: Iterate on packaging: titles, hooks, and first-frame curiosity.

stages.title: Publish consistently
stages.summary: Ship on a rhythm — copy → upload → one small improvement next time.

stages.title: Build workflow habit
stages.summary: Use the full chain so each post builds on the last.

stages.title: First content
stages.summary: Get one complete output copied — then open upload once.

signals.sales_intent: last_v186_intent_id matches intent_promote OR shop/promote/sell in id
